title: Indeni Demo
content:
Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Indeni pack (Indeni, partner-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: AreValuesEqual, Indeni, JiraCreateIssue-example, jira-v2.

    scriptarguments:

      Interval:

      PollingCommandArgName:
        simple: issueId
      PollingCommandName:

      Timeout:
        simple: '60'
      dt:
        simple: Ticket(val.Status != 'Done').Id
    separatecontext: true
    loop:

      exitCondition: ''
      wait: 1

    results:
